Description: Products that reduce water waste around the home, garden and workplace.
Filters, cartridges and water-quality products for cleaner everyday water.
Garden, greenhouse and outdoor watering systems.
Targeted low-waste watering kits, pipe and emitters.
Products for collecting, storing and reusing rainwater.
Alarms, sensors and monitors that help detect leaks early.
Connected timers, sensors and water monitors.
Pumps for moving, boosting, draining and circulating water.
Cleaning and care products for water systems and equipment.
Testing kits and meters for checking water quality.
Small parts, fittings and repair accessories.
Products for pools, ponds and water features.
Products for businesses, trades and facilities teams.
